title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.

title: Anthropic’s Long-Term Benefit Trust appoints Vas Narasimhan to Board of Directors
Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
summary: Video showing Skills in Chrome

title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
summary: Woman working with a large tool. On the left are the Google and MIT FutureTech logos, "AI for the Economy Forum", and "Innovation and Adaption in the New Era"

title: Navigating the generative AI journey: The Path-to-Value framework from AWS
summary: In this post, we introduce the Generative AI Path-to-Value (P2V) framework, a structured approach to help you move generative AI initiatives from concept to production and sustained value creation.

title: Use-case based deployments on SageMaker JumpStart
summary: We're excited to announce the launch of Amazon SageMaker JumpStart optimized deployments. SageMaker JumpStart improved deployments address the need for rich and straightforward deployment customization on SageMaker JumpStart by offering pre-defined deployment configurations, designed for specific use cases. Customers maintain the same level of visibility into the details of their proposed deployments, but now deployments are optimized for their specific use case and performance constraint.

title: Best practices to run inference on Amazon SageMaker HyperPod
summary: This post explores how Amazon SageMaker HyperPod provides a comprehensive solution for inference workloads. We walk you through the platform’s key capabilities for dynamic scaling, simplified deployment, and intelligent resource management. By the end of this post, you’ll understand how to use the HyperPod automated infrastructure, cost optimization features, and performance enhancements to reduce your total cost of ownership by up to 40% while accelerating your generative AI deployments from concept to production.

title: How Guidesly built AI-generated trip reports for outdoor guides on AWS
summary: In this post, we walk through how Guidesly built Jack AI on AWS using AWS Lambda, AWS Step Functions, Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3), Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS), Amazon SageMaker AI, and Amazon Bedrock to ingest trip media, enrich it with context, apply computer vision and generative AI, and publish marketing-ready content across multiple channels—securely, reliably, and at scale.

title: Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now Generally Available
summary: With the new Spring AI AgentCore SDK, you can build production-ready AI agents and run them on the highly scalable AgentCore Runtime. The Spring AI AgentCore SDK is an open source library that brings Amazon Bedrock AgentCore capabilities into Spring AI. In this post, we build an AI agent starting with a chat endpoint, then adding streaming responses, conversation memory, and tools for web browsing and code execution.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: All that glitters: When “gold-like” answers mask functional failures on coding agent benchmarks
AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >

title: April Update: New Model, Memory, and Lorebook
summary:
Today I want to share some big updates.

Model improvements, Memory upgrades, and a feature our community has been asking for since long before I joined. All of this was shaped by community feedback and testing, and I'm grateful for every bit of input that got us here.

title: DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, described as a product that can equip every computer with its autonomous agent capability in one minute. It is presented as a new native product on the company homepage.

title: GLM-5-Turbo release
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company positions it as part of its new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 flagship model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI launched GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also states it performs strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-4.6V, a 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model with strong performance. It is described as supporting native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K long context.

title: AutoGLM agent model announcement
summary: Zhipu AI announced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B open source for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader agent ecosystem. The model is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS concept and Agent products AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This marked a broader push into agent operating systems and computer-use AI.

title: Agent OpenDay: AutoGLM and GLM-PC progress update
summary: At its Agent OpenDay, Zhipu AI shared new progress on its agent products, saying AutoGLM can autonomously execute more than 50 steps and work across apps. The company also said GLM-PC entered internal testing and highlighted expanded cross-app and cross-device agent capabilities.

Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, a speech model designed for attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interactive conversations.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena, making a preview version of the model available for evaluation.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0, marking the release of its new model generation.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation capabilities.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0, releasing the latest version of the Seedance model.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, a model focused on advanced mathematical reasoning built with a novel agentic architecture.

title: Official Release of Seed1.8
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent the company says marks a shift into an era focused on delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as a practical enterprise agent offering rather than a research demo.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification highlights external validation for the company's enterprise AI infrastructure product.

title: Yi-Lightning introduced as a global SOTA Mixture-of-Experts LLM
summary: 01.AI highlighted Yi-Lightning as a globally state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model. The page also indicates the Yi model family has an open-source component.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI reported a meeting between Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev and CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The item is a notable corporate and diplomatic engagement involving the company leadership.
